texto: Though we cannot think alike, may we not love alike? May we not be of one heart, though we are not of one opinion? Without all doubt, we may.
autor: from a letter in the Works of John Wesley
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de from a letter in the Works of John Wesley que provoca limites e escolhas conscientes. Ao questionar “Though we cannot think alike, may we not love alike? May we not be of one heart, though we are no…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre amor, alike, love, com foco em love e opinion.
